languages.text: "Что произошло после нападения на Сектор Бионика? Я думал{mf||а}, что ты погиб".

traits.locale_text: "Как ты чувствуешь себя после того, что произошло в медотсеке?"

languages.text: "What happened after the attack on the Sector Bionica? I thought you were dead."
languages.original_text: "Что произошло после нападения на Сектор Бионика? Я думал{mf||а}, что ты погиб".

traits.locale_text: "What happened after the attack on the Sector Bionica? I thought you were dead."
"What happened after the attack on the medbay? I thought you were dead."
"What happened after the attack on the medbay? I thought you were dead."
"What happened after the attack on the Sector Bionica? I thought you were dead."

languages.text: 「メディベイの襲撃の後、どうなったの？死んだと思ったよ」
languages.original_text: "What happened after the attack on the medbay? I thought you were dead."

traits.locale_text: 「メディベイの襲撃の後、どうなったの？死んだと思ったよ。」

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'ya yapılan saldırıdan sonra ne oldu? Öldüğünü sanmıştım."
languages.original_text: "What happened after the attack on the Sector Bionica? I thought you were dead."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'ya yapılan saldırıdan sonra ne oldu? Öldüğünü sanmıştım."

languages.text: «¿Qué ocurrió después del ataque contra el Sector Bionica? Pensé que había muerto».
languages.original_text: "What happened after the attack on the Sector Bionica? I thought you were dead."

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué ocurrió después del ataque contra el Sector Bionica? Pensé que había muerto».

languages.text: “仿生区遇袭事件之后发生了什么？我以为你已经死了。”
languages.original_text: "What happened after the attack on the Sector Bionica? I thought you were dead."

traits.locale_text: “仿生区遇袭事件之后发生了什么？我以为你已经死了。”

languages.text: « Que s'est-il passé après l'attaque du secteur Bionica ? Je vous croyais mort. »
languages.original_text: "What happened after the attack on the Sector Bionica? I thought you were dead."

traits.locale_text: « Que s'est-il passé après l'attaque du secteur Bionica ? Je vous croyais mort. »

languages.text: "Was ist nach dem Angriff auf den Sektor Bionica passiert? Ich dachte, Ihr wärt tot."
languages.original_text: "What happened after the attack on the Sector Bionica? I thought you were dead."

traits.locale_text: "Was ist nach dem Angriff auf den Sektor Bionica passiert? Ich dachte, Ihr wärt tot."
